tree.name: Gabe Vincent
tree.narrative: **Gabe Vincent** — a 2023 NBA Finals starter with Miami — came to Atlanta in a February 2026 trade with the Lakers. The Hawks sent **Luke Kennard**, a free agent signing from the prior summer, to L.A. to land the playoff-tested guard and a future second-rounder.
tree.tradeDescription: Hawks traded Luke Kennard to Lakers for Gabe Vincent and a 2032 2nd-round pick (LAL own).
tree.note: 2023 NBA Finals starter with Miami, playoff-tested guard.

assetsGivenUp.name: Luke Kennard
assetsGivenUp.narrative: **Luke Kennard** was signed as a free agent in July 2025 from Memphis. The elite three-point shooter (career 44%) was flipped to the Lakers just seven months later to acquire **Gabe Vincent**.
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent from Memphis. Elite 3-point shooter, career 44% from deep. Sent to LAL in Vincent trade.
